abilities.description: Reveal the top card of target opponent's library. If it's a land, you gain 1 life. Then that player shuffles. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

effect.description: Reveal the top card of target opponent's library. If it's a land, you gain 1 life. Then that player shuffles. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
effect.name: PeekAndReveal
